arts.ttl: Hiroki Itō hopes for a new beginning at Bayern Munich following his injury comeback in UCL match against Celtic
arts.sum: Hiroki Itō’s journey at Bayern Munich so far has been horribly disappointing, though to no fault of the Japanese defender. Hopefully, the worst is finally behind Itō and he can start to, at long last, show his qualities in a Bayern shirt.

arts.ttl: Jan-Christian Dreesen celebrates second Bayern Munich UCL away win since 2023 and Hiroki Itō’s return
arts.sum: But this was a special day because, if we don’t count the Shakhtar game that wasn’t really an away game, this was the first away win in the Champions League since 12 December 2023 against Manchester United,” Dreesen explained in the post match banquet, via @iMiaSanMia . Bayern Munich ’s away record this season has been notoriously poor, but the Bavarians did take a step towards rectifying it with a 1-2 away win at Celtic.

arts.ttl: How Kompany is 'paving way' for black coaches at Bayern
arts.sum: Troy Townsend says Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany is paving the way for black managers in an exploration of the young coach's background.

arts.ttl: Kane and Olise lead Bayern to victory against spirited Celtic
arts.sum: A Michael Olise rocket and Harry Kane volley give Bayern Munich a 2-1 victory against an impressive Celtic in the Champions League play-offs.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané still in the dark on his contract
arts.sum: The report says that Bayern has not relayed any kind of signal to Sané that his contract could be extended, and so the German winger does not know whether he will continue at Bayern in the upcoming seasons, or if he will have to find a team elsewhere that could use his talents. According to a report captured by @iMiaSanMia, Leroy Sané is still yet to receive information from Bayern Munich about his contract and time at the club.

arts.ttl: Nicolas Kuhn has Celtic appetite for Bayern destruction as THAT moment gives him hope the comeback could be on
arts.sum: The Hoops wide man is convinced Celts have the attacking threat to do damage in the Champions League return mission

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers comment pricks Jim Goodwin's ears up as Dundee Utd turn to Bayern blueprint to stun Celtic
arts.sum: Rodgers and Goodwin will do battle in the Premiership again this weekend

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 31: Where things stand with Bayern Munich and Florian Wirtz; Paul Wanner wants assurance; Should Eric Dier and Josip Stanišić get minutes?; and MORE!
arts.sum: This is what we have on tap for this edition of the Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show: Also, be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane is happy with Bayern Munich’s ability to stay strong amid pressure in UCL win over Celtic, but admits improvement is needed
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s victory over Celtic in the Champions League did not come easy. “Whenever you win a game like this, you’re always pleased because it’s not an easy place to come,” Kane explained, via @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Player Ratings Poll: Celtic 1 - 2 Bayern Munich in Champions League play-off
arts.sum: Bayern Munich took home a 2-1 first leg advantage from Celtic Park in a Champions League Round of 16 play-off tie vs. Player ratings [ @BILD ] pic.twitter.com/Nd5FIj9AIN
